nasb.text: Now so that your heart does not grow faint, And you are not afraid at the report that will be heard in the land— For the report will come one year, And after that another report in another year, And violence will be in the land With ruler against ruler—

esv.text: Let not your heart faint, and be not fearful at the report heard in the land, when a report comes in one year and afterward a report in another year, and violence is in the land, and ruler is against ruler.

cnv.text: 你們不要心驚膽怯， 也不要因在境內聽到的謠言懼怕； 因為今年有謠言傳來， 明年也會有謠言傳來， 境內有強暴的事， 官長互相攻擊。

ccb.text: 境内谣言四起时， 你们不要惊慌害怕， 因为今年传这风声， 明年却传那风声， 说境内必有暴乱， 官长要互相残杀。
